name: MrBeast导演风格·粤菜30秒分镜提示词模板
description: 基于MrBeast内容创造方法论蒸馏的7个核心技法，为Seedance2.0设计的30秒粤菜美食推广短视频提示词模板。30秒=6个5秒片段，遵循三段递进曲线：期待(0-10s)→冲击(10-20s)→爆发(20-30s)

stages.name: 期待
stages.goal: 让观众停下来并产生期待

stages.name: 冲击
stages.goal: 用视觉奇观冲击观众感官

stages.name: 爆发
stages.goal: 破坏性揭示+静默蓄力+最终爆发

segment1.name: 封面帧·成品极美特写
segment1.promptTemplate: Ultra close-up of [DISH_NAME], [TEXTURE_DESCRIPTION], glistening [SAUCE/GLAZE], steam rising gently, [ANGLE] angle, warm golden lighting, shallow depth of field, food photography, cinematic, 4K
segment1.promptTemplateCN: [菜品名]极近特写，[质感描述]，[酱汁/光泽]闪烁，轻柔蒸汽上升，[角度]角度，暖金色光线，浅景深，美食摄影，电影感，4K
segment1.audioDesign: 环境音：轻微蒸汽声+酱汁滴落声
segment1.notes: 第1帧=缩略图，0.5秒决策窗口。成品必须是最诱人状态，不做任何铺垫

segment2.name: 食材·质感展示
segment2.promptTemplate: Macro shot of raw [KEY_INGREDIENT], [TEXTURE_DETAIL], being [PREP_ACTION] by hands, jump cut to [PREP_RESULT], dramatic side lighting, shallow DOF, cinematic, 4K
segment2.promptTemplateCN: [关键食材]微距镜头，[质感细节]，双手[处理动作]，跳切至[处理结果]，戏剧性侧光，浅景深，电影感，4K
segment2.audioDesign: 环境音：刀落砧板声+食材断裂声（ASMR级收音）
segment2.notes: 跳切省略法：只保留动作起点和终点，删除一切中间过程。切菜只留刀落和切好

segment3.name: 烹饪·慢镜粒子奇观
segment3.promptTemplate: Slow motion [COOKING_ACTION], [PARTICLE_EFFECT], 240fps, dramatic fire/oil/steam particles, [DISH_NAME] in [COOKWARE], intense orange glow, cinematic, 4K
segment3.promptTemplateCN: [烹饪动作]慢镜头，[粒子效果]，240fps，戏剧性火焰/油花/蒸汽粒子，[菜品名]在[厨具]中，强烈橙色光芒，电影感，4K
segment3.audioDesign: 声画互补：滋滋声配慢镜油花（互补），不配火焰画面（重复）
segment3.notes: 慢镜粒子奇观：只在视觉爆发点使用120-240fps，每30秒最多2处慢镜。概念简单（慢镜）×执行极端（240fps）

segment4.name: 烹饪·跳切加速
segment4.promptTemplate: Rapid sequence: [ACTION_START] jump cut to [ACTION_END], [ACTION_START2] jump cut to [ACTION_END2], dynamic camera movement, warm kitchen lighting, cinematic, 4K
segment4.promptTemplateCN: 快速序列：[动作起点]跳切至[动作终点]，[动作起点2]跳切至[动作终点2]，动态运镜，温暖厨房光线，电影感，4K
segment4.audioDesign: 环境音：连续烹饪声（翻炒+锅气声+调味声）
segment4.notes: 跳切省略法：连续跳切加速节奏，省略=加速=零无聊。每镜不超过1秒

segment5.name: 静默蓄力
segment5.promptTemplate: Complete silence. Slow elegant plating of [DISH_NAME], [PLATING_ACTION], sauce drizzling in real-time, minimal movement, anticipation building, warm backlight, cinematic, 4K
segment5.promptTemplateCN: 完全静默。[菜品名]缓慢优雅装盘，[装盘动作]，酱汁实时淋落，极简动作，蓄力感，暖色逆光，电影感，4K
segment5.audioDesign: 完全静默1-1.5秒（无音乐无环境音），然后极轻的酱汁淋落声渐入
segment5.notes: 静默蓄力爆发：落版前1-1.5秒完全静默，蓄力越深释放越强。对比产生最大张力

segment6.name: 破坏性揭示·最终爆发
segment6.promptTemplate: [DESTRUCTIVE_ACTION] revealing [INNER_TEXTURE], [JUICE_FLOW], extreme close-up, burst of sound and visual energy, final hero shot of [DISH_NAME], warm dramatic lighting, cinematic, 4K
segment6.promptTemplateCN: [破坏性动作]揭示[内在质感]，[汁水流出]，极近特写，声音和视觉能量爆发，[菜品名]最终英雄镜头，暖色戏剧光线，电影感，4K
segment6.audioDesign: 声音爆发：破坏动作声（咔嚓/撕裂/汁水声）+环境音全开
segment6.notes: 破坏性揭示：筷子夹起/刀切/戳破展示内在质感。完整食物是封闭的，破坏动作打开它。这是最强的传达——90分传达让60分内容看起来像90分

crispyPigeon.name: 脆皮乳鸽
crispyPigeon.segment1: Ultra close-up of crispy roasted pigeon, golden crackling skin glistening with oil, steam rising, 45° overhead angle, warm golden lighting, shallow DOF, food photography, cinematic, 4K
crispyPigeon.segment2: Macro shot of raw pigeon, smooth skin texture, being seasoned by hands, jump cut to marinated pigeon, dramatic side lighting, shallow DOF, cinematic, 4K
crispyPigeon.segment3: Slow motion deep frying, oil droplets exploding in 240fps, dramatic fire particles, pigeon in wok, intense orange glow, cinematic, 4K
crispyPigeon.segment4: Rapid sequence: pigeon entering oil jump cut to golden skin forming, basting jump cut to skin blistering, dynamic camera, warm kitchen lighting, cinematic, 4K
crispyPigeon.segment5: Complete silence. Slow elegant plating of crispy pigeon, placing on white plate, sauce drizzling in real-time, minimal movement, warm backlight, cinematic, 4K
crispyPigeon.segment6: Chopsticks tearing crispy skin revealing juicy pink meat, juices flowing, extreme close-up, burst of sound, final hero shot, warm dramatic lighting, cinematic, 4K

charSiu.name: 蜜汁叉烧
charSiu.segment1: Ultra close-up of char siu, caramelized edges glistening with honey glaze, charred spots, steam rising, eye-level angle, warm amber lighting, shallow DOF, food photography, cinematic, 4K
charSiu.segment2: Macro shot of pork belly, marbling pattern, being coated in marinade, jump cut to marinated strips, dramatic side lighting, shallow DOF, cinematic, 4K
charSiu.segment3: Slow motion honey glaze application, glaze dripping and caramelizing in 240fps, dramatic flame particles from torch, intense orange glow, cinematic, 4K
charSiu.segment4: Rapid sequence: pork entering oven jump cut to edges charring, glazing jump cut to caramelization, dynamic camera, warm oven lighting, cinematic, 4K
charSiu.segment5: Complete silence. Slow slicing of char siu, cross-section revealing layers, sauce pooling on board, minimal movement, warm backlight, cinematic, 4K
charSiu.segment6: Knife cutting through char siu revealing pink center, juices and glaze flowing, extreme close-up, burst of sound, final hero shot, warm dramatic lighting, cinematic, 4K

rules.coverFrame: 第1帧=缩略图，0.5秒决策窗口，成品必须是最诱人状态
rules.jumpCut: 只保留动作起点和终点，任何超过1秒的静态等待画面必须删除
rules.escalation: 每一镜的刺激度必须高于前一镜，不允许平台期
rules.slowMotion: 每30秒视频最多2处慢镜，只在视觉爆发点使用
rules.destructiveReveal: 落版前必须有破坏性动作展示内在质感
rules.audioVisualComplement: 画面展示质感（视觉），声音补充温度/氛围（听觉），互补而非重复
rules.silenceBurst: 落版前1-1.5秒完全静默，然后一击引爆
